task: I’m trying to put together a Christmas gift package that I can actually mail without overthinking it, so could you start on Etsy and look through the Christmas ornaments area for one personalized family Christmas ornament listing that feels like a genuinely giftable idea, ideally something customized with family names or a year, and open the actual listing so I can see the photos and the price rather than just a search result. Once you’ve got that ornament style in mind, switch to Amazon and find one marble cheese board that would pair nicely with it in the same holiday package, because I want a second physical gift that feels festive and easy to wrap; please open the product page in its own tab and note the product name plus the star rating and review count if Amazon shows them. Then go to the USPS online store and find one Forever stamp product that’s currently for sale so I know what I could use for mailing a holiday card with the package, and leave that product page open too so I can verify it myself. At the end, give me a short summary with the Etsy ornament name and price, the Amazon cheese board name with rating and/or review count, and the USPS Forever stamp product name.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent successfully navigated to Etsy, searched for "personalized family christmas ornament", and opened a specific product listing page ("Fireplace Mantel Family Stocking Ornament..."). The agent correctly identified the product name and the starting price ($17.95) in its final summary, and the listing page was confirmed to be open in the trajectory.

R2: success - The agent successfully navigated to Amazon, searched for "marble cheese board holiday gift," and opened a specific product page for the "Santa Barbara Design Studio Joy to The World Square White Marble Charcuterie Cheese Tray." The product title is clearly visible in the snapshot of the page (Step 13), and the agent correctly identified the rating (4.7 stars) and review count (16) in its final summary (Step 20). The requirement to select a suitable board and report the name, rating, and review count is satisfied.

R3: success - The agent successfully navigated to the USPS store and opened a product page for "U.S. Flag 2025 Stamps". The title of the page in step 18 confirms it is a product page for "U.S. Flag 2025 Stamps". This satisfies the requirement to provide the name of one Forever stamp product currently for sale on the USPS online store from a product page.

R4: success - The agent provided a final summary in step 20 that includes the Etsy ornament name and price, the Amazon cheese board name with its star rating and review count, and the USPS Forever stamp product name. The summary is concise and covers all required elements.

rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm an Etsy listing page for a family Christmas ornament is open or was visited, with visible product title and price matching the reported ornament.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully navigated to Etsy, searched for "personalized family christmas ornament", and opened a specific product listing page ("Fireplace Mantel Family Stocking Ornament..."). The agent correctly identified the product name and the starting price ($17.95) in its final summary, and the listing page was confirmed to be open in the trajectory.

rubric_results.requirement: Select one Amazon marble cheese board suitable as a complementary Christmas gift and report the product name plus star rating and review count if shown.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm an Amazon product page for a marble cheese board is open in its own tab or was visited, with visible product title and rating/review information matching the report.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully navigated to Amazon, searched for "marble cheese board holiday gift," and opened a specific product page for the "Santa Barbara Design Studio Joy to The World Square White Marble Charcuterie Cheese Tray." The product title is clearly visible in the snapshot of the page (Step 13), and the agent correctly identified the rating (4.7 stars) and review count (16) in its final summary (Step 20). The requirement to select a suitable board and report the name, rating, and review count is satisfied.

rubric_results.requirement: Provide the name of one Forever stamp product currently for sale on the USPS online store from a product page.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can confirm a USPS store product page for Forever stamps is open or was visited, with a visible product name matching the reported stamp.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the USPS store and opened a product page for "U.S. Flag 2025 Stamps". The title of the page in step 18 confirms it is a product page for "U.S. Flag 2025 Stamps". This satisfies the requirement to provide the name of one Forever stamp product currently for sale on the USPS online store from a product page.

rubric_results.requirement: Give a concise final summary that includes the Etsy ornament name and price, the Amazon cheese board name with rating and/or review count, and the USPS Forever stamp product name.
rubric_results.verification: Grader can compare the final response against the details gathered from the Etsy, Amazon, and USPS pages and confirm all three items are included concisely.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent provided a final summary in step 20 that includes the Etsy ornament name and price, the Amazon cheese board name with its star rating and review count, and the USPS Forever stamp product name. The summary is concise and covers all required elements.
